summary: Iteration 3 — live LTC mempool auto-detect feature verified end-to-end. All 22 checks passed. LTC invoice launches live listener that polls every 5s; failover from Blockchair (430) to litecoinspace working and log lines populate across multiple cycles (confirmed at ~6s and ~12s). XMR shows shielded message with NO live-log element. Simulate backup still drives PROCESSING → VERIFIED → shake + lever 180° → capsule drop → reveal. Sprite canvas renders (384x384), watermark grid and UNMINTED text overlays present, download-sprite-button produces PNG (gashabits-cute-cat-89cd917f.png). play-again resets to IDLE and re-inserting LTC starts the listener cleanly with fresh log lines. USD ticker computes crypto amount (0.00344907 LTC @ $43.49). Responsive: 390px stacks column with no h-scroll; 1440px is row. No app-level JS/console exceptions — only expected Blockchair 430 network errors as noted in the request.
critical_code_review_comments: None blocking. Minor: Blockchair `dashboards/address/{addr}` returns most recent tx (could be outgoing/historical), not necessarily incoming. Cross-verified by `validateTransaction` (destination match + 0-conf + 180s window) so false-positive risk is mitigated. Consider filtering to incoming outputs directly in detectViaBlockchair for cleaner semantics.
detectViaLitecoinspace correctly checks vout for scriptpubkey_address matching leased address — good.
pollSweep gracefully handles CORS/429 with failover; catch block continues to next explorer — good.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live LTC mempool polling verified. Blockchair currently returns HTTP 430 (IP throttle) — failover to litecoinspace.org works correctly. If a real inbound LTC tx to ltc1qlgwkgw7fl5g7xsueh3ajd4rsvjvhrwc0yhnu6y were ever produced during test, verifyAndArm would be gated by validateTransaction (0-conf, <=180s age, destination match). Simulate path is the only way to reach REVEAL in tests.
